hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */uv.lock|uv.lock|*/.streamlit/secrets.toml|.streamlit/secrets.toml) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Edits to uv.lock and .streamlit/secrets.toml are blocked: change uv.lock via uv (uv add / uv lock / uv sync), and edit .streamlit/secrets.toml by hand since it is gitignored."}}' ;; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; case "$f" in *.py) uv run ruff format "$f" && uv run ruff check --fix "$f" ;; esac; } || true
out=$(uv run ty check 2>&1) || { printf '%s\n' "$out" >&2; exit 2; }
